basic_details.job_title: BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 17 Posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years. Relaxation: Relaxable up to 70 years with approval from Competent Authority.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS/DNB/PG Diploma in respective field, MBBS with 1 year experience
qualification.details: Gynaecologist & Obstetrician, General Surgeon, Orthopedic Surgeon, General Physician, Paediatrician, Ophthalmologist, ENT Surgeon, Psychiatrist, Dermatologist: MD/MS/DNB/PG Diploma in respective field. General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO): MBBS with 1 year experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHEL PTMC posts?
faq.answer: The last date to send details by email for the BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant posts is 30th June 2026. Candidates are encouraged to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by BHEL?
faq.answer: Bharat Heavy Electricals (BHEL) has announced a total of 17 vacancies for the Part Time Medical Consultant (PTMC) positions across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: For the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) position, candidates must possess an MBBS degree with at least one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the BHEL recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Part Time Medical Consultant posts announced by BHEL.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the BHEL PTMC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Part Time Medical Consultant posts is 65 years. However, this can be relaxed up to 70 years with the approval of the Competent Authority.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for these BHEL positions?
faq.answer: These positions are being filled through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report to the specified venue on the interview dates with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interview for BHEL PTMC posts be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at Bharat Heavy Electricals (BHEL), Haridwar, Uttarakhand, Pin code: 249403.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for BHEL PTMC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Part Time Medical Consultant posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. What are the dates for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant posts will be held on 02nd July 2026 and 03rd July 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the BHEL PTMC posts?
faq.answer: The last date to send details by email for the BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant posts is 30th June 2026. Candidates are encouraged to submit their applications well before this deadline.
